positive: A stylized, mystical celestial forest scene. The composition features a central grouping of bioluminescent, fantastical flora—large, luminous leaves, glowing mushrooms, and winding vines—intertwined around a subtle, crescent moon silhouette. The color palette is deep indigo, ethereal cyan, sapphire blue, and accented by neon teal glowing highlights. The style should be highly detailed, vector-graphic quality, reminiscent of Japanese woodblock prints meets Art Nouveau, maintaining clean lines and stark silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. Lighting is dramatic, coming solely from the glowing elements, creating strong rim lighting and high contrast against the dark background. The overall mood is serene, magical, and mysterious. Minimal background noise, maximum visual pop and central focus.
negative: blurry, deformed, bad anatomy, text, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, out of focus, dirty, monochrome, grainy, noise, extra limbs, extra digits, jpeg artifacts, low resolution
